Get the overall acceptability score from the acceptability classification scores

Source: R/quality_scorers.R
compute_quality_score.Rd

Calculate the total amount of penalty points based on each plausibility test result acceptability classification for WFHZ and MFAZ.

Usage

compute_quality_score(df, type = c("mfaz", "whz"))

Arguments

df

A dataset object of class data.frame to calculate from.

type

A choice between "wfhz" and "mfaz" for the basis on which the calculations should be made.

Value

A data.frame based on df with a new column named "quality_score" for the overall of acceptability (of quality) score.

Examples


## A sample data ----

df <- data.frame(
flagged_class = "Excellent",
age_ratio_class = "Good",
sex_ratio_class = "Problematic",
dps_class = "Excellent",
sd_class = "Excellent",
skew_class = "Good",
kurt_class = "Acceptable"
)

## Apply the function ----
compute_quality_score(df, type = "mfaz")
#> [1] 16
